title: EWADeepThinkerResult
description: Supplemental findings from the Deep Thinker agent identifying implicit cross-domain risks.

supplemental_findings.description: Implicit risks identified through cross-domain analysis, not flagged by SAP.

finding_id.description: ID with prefix DT-, e.g. DT-01.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the implicit risk.

domain.description: The most relevant domain for this finding.

description.description: Detailed description of the implicit risk.

rationale.description: Explanation of why this is a risk despite not being SAP-flagged.
